name: cherrystone/core-features
title: Core Features
description: Three-column value proposition block from the Cherrystone homepage.

heading.default: A working group, not a fund.

lede.default: We are a member-led group. Each investor writes their own check, and the room reviews every deal together. Cherrystone has been doing this for two decades - patiently, in New England.

default.title: Early-stage checks across six verticals.
default.body: Life sciences, software, consumer, industrial tech, healthcare, and fintech. Individual member checks plus pooled vehicles when the round calls for it.

default.title: Operators with real exits.
default.body: Our leadership and members include a former Canadian Ambassador, a former Pfizer VP, M&A bankers, PE partners, and founders behind exits to Merck, Verifone, Philips, and Genscape.

default.title: Long-term partners after the wire.
default.body: Founders we back get hands-on help - board seats where useful, intros to customers and downstream funds, and follow-on capital when the metrics earn it.
